questions.text: Is the body temperature 38°C or above?
Has the body temperature not gone down over the last 3 days after having received fever medications?
Is the patient shivering?
How often does the patient feel nausea?
How often does the patient vomit?
Is the patient losing an appetite?
Is the patient feeling dizzy?
Is the patient experiencing headache?
Is the patient having a sore throat?
Is the patient having pain in the back abdomen, bones, joints, or muscles?
Is the patient experiencing malaise and drowsiness symptoms?
Is the patient having red spots?
Is the patient’s mucosal bleeding?
Is the patient coming down with spontaneous bleeding such as nosebleed?
Does the patient’s skin show easy bruising-like symptoms?
Is the tourniquet test positive?
Is the patient’s face pale?
Is the patient’s eyelid pale?
Is the patient’s gum pale?
Are the patient’s nails pale?
How often does the patient feel tired?
How often does the patient feel weak and sluggish?
Has the patient seen stars and felt dizzy?
How often does the patient feel puffy?
Is the patient’s breath pace fast (more than 20 times a minute)?
Is the patient’s heartbeat above the normal rate (more than 100 times a minute)?
Is the patient coming down with heart murmurs?
